name: inkpdf
description: Free, 100% client-side PDF editor: add text, draw and sign, download. No server, no uploads.

scripts.postbuild: cp dist/index.html dist/404.html && mkdir -p dist/merge dist/split dist/watermark && cp dist/index.html dist/merge/index.html && cp dist/index.html dist/split/index.html && cp dist/index.html dist/watermark/index.html
